top3.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM superhero s
JOIN attribute a ON a.attribute_name = 'speed'
JOIN hero_attribute ha ON ha.hero_id = s.id AND ha.attribute_id = a.id
WHERE ha.attribute_value = (
    SELECT MAX(attribute_value) 
    FROM hero_attribute 
    WHERE attribute_id = a.id
);

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM superhero s
JOIN attribute a ON a.attribute_name = 'speed'
JOIN hero_attribute ha ON ha.hero_id = s.id AND ha.attribute_id = a.id
WHERE ha.attribute_value = (
    SELECT MAX(attribute_value) 
    FROM hero_attribute 
    WHERE attribute_id = a.id
);

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM superhero s
JOIN hero_attribute ha ON ha.hero_id = s.id
JOIN attribute a ON a.id = ha.attribute_id
WHERE a.attribute_name = 'speed' 
  AND ha.attribute_value = (
    SELECT MAX(ha2.attribute_value)
    FROM hero_attribute ha2
    JOIN attribute a2 ON a2.id = ha2.attribute_id
    WHERE a2.attribute_name = 'speed'
);

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM superhero s
JOIN hero_attribute ha ON ha.hero_id = s.id
JOIN attribute a ON a.id = ha.attribute_id AND a.attribute_name = 'speed'
WHERE ha.attribute_value = (
    SELECT MAX(ha2.attribute_value)
    FROM hero_attribute ha2
    JOIN attribute a2 ON a2.id = ha2.attribute_id
    WHERE a2.attribute_name = 'speed'
);

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM superhero s
JOIN attribute a ON a.attribute_name = 'speed'
JOIN hero_attribute ha ON ha.hero_id = s.id AND ha.attribute_id = a.id
WHERE ha.attribute_value = (
    SELECT MAX(attribute_value) 
    FROM hero_attribute 
    WHERE attribute_id = a.id
);

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM superhero s
JOIN hero_attribute ha ON ha.hero_id = s.id
JOIN attribute a ON a.id = ha.attribute_id
WHERE a.attribute_name = 'speed' 
  AND ha.attribute_value = (
    SELECT MAX(ha2.attribute_value)
    FROM hero_attribute ha2
    JOIN attribute a2 ON a2.id = ha2.attribute_id
    WHERE a2.attribute_name = 'speed'
);

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM superhero s
JOIN alignment a ON s.alignment_id = a.id
WHERE a.alignment = 'good'

final.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM superhero s
JOIN attribute a ON a.attribute_name = 'speed'
JOIN hero_attribute ha ON ha.hero_id = s.id AND ha.attribute_id = a.id
WHERE ha.attribute_value = (
    SELECT MAX(attribute_value) 
    FROM hero_attribute 
    WHERE attribute_id = a.id
);
